fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP image, combining image data with a display duration.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` pairs an image (represented as an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap>) with a
<xref:System.TimeSpan> duration for use in animated WebP encoding via
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated%2A>.

Constructors that accept an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap> or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKImage> create an
internal pixmap from the provided source.

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap2, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(200)),
};
using SKData? data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from a bitmap and a display duration.

params.bitmap: The bitmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The time this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from an image and a display duration.

params.duration: The time this frame is displayed.
params.image: The image providing the pixel data for this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> from a pixmap and a display duration.

params.pixmap: The pixmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The time this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Gets the length of time this frame is displayed.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.TimeSpan" /> specifying how long this frame is shown before advancing to the next frame.

fields.summary: Gets the pixmap containing the pixel data for this frame.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> with the frame's pixel data.
